title: video-pipeline project.yml
description: Per-project manifest. Declares identity (-> glossary layer), profile (-> dimensions + safe-zone spec), and rough-cut behaviour.

identity.description: Selects the config/glossary identity layer (e.g. dyson-hope, sigil-zero, jason-cook-design).

profile.description: Output target. Selects dimensions + config/safezone/<profile>.safezone.json (e.g. reels-9x16).

trim_filler.description: Trim speech filler/false starts/dead air. Set false to preserve audio continuity (e.g. live-off-the-mixer DJ record showcases).

silence_gap_s.description: Inter-word gap (seconds) above which dead air is trimmed.

keep_pad_lead_s.description: Padding (seconds) kept BEFORE speech at each cut.

keep_pad_tail_s.description: Padding (seconds) kept AFTER speech at each cut (larger — Whisper clips word ends early).

extra_filler_words.description: Additional per-project filler tokens to trim (lowercased, punctuation-stripped).

captions.description: Per-project caption style/chunk overrides over config/caption-styles/ (project wins over identity wins over global). Unset keys fall through to the layers, then built-in defaults.

font_size.description: Cap height in px at the profile's native height.

position.description: Vertical anchor inside the safe zone.

max_words.description: Max words per cue (chunker). With min_words, this is the words-per-cue range: 1/1 = single-word captions, 2/4 = phrase groups.

min_words.description: Min words per cue; below this a cue is a 'widow' the chunker avoids (unless min_words is 1, which permits single-word cues).

max_gap_s.description: Inter-word gap (s) that forces a cue break (chunker).

target_words.description: Words-per-cue the chunker aims for (balance target). 0 = auto (midpoint of the range). If set, must lie within [min_words, max_words].

break_words.description: Override the built-in function-word list the chunker prefers to break before / avoid breaking after (phrase-aware breaking).

karaoke.description: Karaoke active-word highlight: each word lights up as it is spoken. Works at any range; most striking at 2-4 words per cue.

emphasize_glossary_terms.description: Flag glossary canonical terms as emphasis words.

qc.description: Safe-zone QC (Phase 4) thresholds + static overlay elements to check. Captions and faces are supplied at runtime; declare persistent brand marks (logo/CTA) here so every render checks them.

occlusion_frac.description: Caption-over-face flag threshold: fraction of a caption box overlapping a detected face.

face_danger_frac.description: Face-in-danger flag threshold: fraction of a detected face inside the danger region.

intrusion_frac.description: Danger-intrusion tolerance for protected elements (0 = flag any intrusion).

check_caption_over_face.description: Run the subject-aware caption-over-face check (needs face detection).

check_face_in_danger.description: Flag when the speaker's face drifts into the danger region (e.g. a bad reframe crop).

elements.description: Static overlay elements checked on every render (e.g. a fixed logo or CTA).

metadata.description: Free-form project metadata (date, hook, render_filename, notes, ...).
